name: MKBHD
oneLine: The most influential consumer-tech reviewer on YouTube, known for clean, balanced flagship-phone and EV reviews.
bio: Marques Brownlee (born December 3, 1993, Maplewood, NJ) started his YouTube channel in 2008 while in high school and grew it into the dominant consumer-tech review brand on the platform, surpassing 20 million subscribers by mid-2025. He attended the Howe School at Stevens Institute of Technology, majoring in business and information technology. Beyond reviews, he co-hosts the Waveform podcast (since August 2019) and plays professional ultimate frisbee for the New York Empire of the UFA.
style: clean, even-toned, high-bitrate single-host reviews with deliberate cinematography and minimal hype
notable: Studio Tour videos on his Maplewood/NJ studio
